sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44402" key="eu)lokope/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐλοκοπέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n44402.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be eaten of worms</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:5:81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.81</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
